sections.title: Getting started
Talking to Khazard Guard at the east entrance

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: This area is restricted, leave now!

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: OUT! And don't come back.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard around the Fight Arena

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I don't know you stranger. Get off our land.

sections.title: Talking to Local

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: Hello stranger, are you new to these parts? You look lost.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: I suppose you're here for the fight arena? There are some rich folk fighting tomorrow. Should be entertaining.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there. Looks like you're in some trouble.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Oh I wish this broken cart was my only problem... I've got to find my family...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Would you? Please?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: I'm Lady Servil, my husband is Sir Servil. We were travelling north together with our son Sammy when we were ambushed by General Khazard's men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: General Khazard?

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: He's been after me ever since I declined his hand in marriage.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Now he's kidnapped my husband and son to fight in his battle arena to the south of here. I hate to think what he'll do to them. He's a sick and twisted man.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try my best to return your family.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please do. My family is wealthy and can reward you handsomely. I'll be waiting here for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you can, good luck.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Brave traveller, please... bring back my family.

sections.title: Entering the arena
Talking to Khazard Guard by the armour chest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Who goes there?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I don't know who you are. Get out of my house stranger.

sections.title: Opening the armour chest
Searching the armour chest
Talking to Lady Servil after getting armour

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Have you had any luck with freeing my family?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've managed to get a guard's uniform, hopefully I can infiltrate the arena.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please hurry.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard by the armour chest with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Despicable thieving scum, that was good armour. Did you see anyone around here soldier?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me? No, no one!

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Hmmmm.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard around the fight arena with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Can I help you stranger?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Oh, you're a guard as well. That's ok then. We don't like strangers around here.

sections.title: Talking to Local after getting the armour

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: I heard the Servil family are fighting soon. Should be very entertaining.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: Hello stranger, are you new to these parts?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I am.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: What's your business?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just visiting friends in the cells.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: Visiting, that's funny.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: Only Khazard guards are allowed to see prisoners. Unless you know where to get some Khazard armour, you won't be visiting anyone.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard barman

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: Hi, what can I get you? We have a range of quality brews.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a beer please.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: That'll be two gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: There you go, that's two gold coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any news?

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: If you want to see the action around here you should visit the famous Khazard fight arena. I've seen some grand battles in my time. Ogres, goblins, even dragons have fought there.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: Although you have to feel sorry for some of the slaves sent in there.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard inside the building with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I've never seen you around here before!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Long live General Khazard!

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Erm.. yes.. soldier, I take it you're new around here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You could say that.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Khazard died two hundred years ago. However his dark spirit remains in the form of the undead maniac General Khazard. Remember he is your master, always watching.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Got that newbie?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Undead, maniac, master. Got it, loud and clear.

sections.title: Opening door while a Khazard Guard is nearby

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This door appears to be locked.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Nice observation guard. You could have just asked to be let in like a normal person.

sections.title: Talking to Joe

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do either of you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: If we did, why would we tell you guard?

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: Until our last breath, our every action will be against Khazard. Never will we help you.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do either of you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: I have heard of those of whom you speak. But I fear it may be too late.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: It is said that Khazard has a personal vendetta against those two, their time is therefore short.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: You're a brave [man/woman]. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.

sections.title: Talking to Kelvin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do either of you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: If we did, why would we tell you guard?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Until our last breath, our every action will be against Khazard. Never will we help you.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: I have heard of those of whom you speak. But I fear it may be too late.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: It is said that Khazard has a personal vendetta against those two, their time is therefore short.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: You're a brave [man/woman]. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.

sections.title: Talking to Fightslave

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know of a Justin or Sammy Servil in this arena?

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: Please leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: I've not met anybody in here by that name.

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: You're not a real guard. I've been in here long enough to know that. What's your business?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been sent to rescue Sir Servil and his son.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I've seen them in here, although they don't look up to much. My advice to you is to leave before you end up in a cell too.

sections.title: Opening door to the arena

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: And where do you think you're going? Only General Khazard decides who fights in the arena. Get out of here.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Long live General Khazard!

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Erm.. yes.. quite right.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Have you come to laugh at the fight slaves? I used to really enjoy it, but after a while they become quite boring.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Now I just want a decent drink. Mind you, too much Khali brew and I'll fall asleep.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard again with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Bored, bored, bored. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining. Selfish the lot of them.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I used to enjoy this job, but now all I want is a decent drink.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Please Sir, don't hurt me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sshh. This uniform is a disguise, I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sshh. I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: The guard always keeps hold of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't lose heart, I'll be back.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after entering the arena

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil, I have managed to infiltrate General Khazard's arena.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: And my family?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Please hurry.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard barman after learning about the Khali brew

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: Hi, what can I get you? We have a range of quality brews.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a Khali brew please.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: That'll be five gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Khazard barman
lines.text: There you go, that's five gold coins. I suggest lying down before you drink it. That way you have less distance to collapse.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard while holding Khali brew

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Bored, bored, bored. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining. Selfish the lot of them.* Player: Do you still fancy a drink?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I really shouldn't... oh... ok then just the one.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Blimey this stuff is pretty good. It's not too strong is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not at all. You'll be fine.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: That is some gooood stuff... yeah... wooh yeah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Yeesshh, hiccup! Oooh, maybe I sshould relax for a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good idea. I'll look after the prisoners.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Yeesh, yes that shounds reasonable. Here, 'hiccup', take the keysch. Any trouble, you give... you givem a good beating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem, I'll keep them in line.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard after getting the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, how's the job?

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Please, leave me alone. I'm sure the walls never used to sway that much.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard after losing the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, er.. I lost the keys.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: What?! You're foolish...

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: ...and I'm drunk. Here, take my spare set.

sections.title: Talking to drunk Khazard Guard after getting him drunk without Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Go away. Thish areash resh... restricted! We don't like strangersh, 'specially ones who sway. Oooh!

sections.title: Using keys on a cell that does not contain Sammy Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The gate is locked, but Sammy's not in there anyway.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil after getting the keys

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sammy look, I have the keys.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Wow! Please set me free, then we can find my dad. I overheard a guard talking. I think they've taken him to the arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, we'd better hurry.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: I'll run ahead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sammy, where's your father?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Quick, help him! That beast will kill him. He's too old to fight.

sections.title: The battles
Talking to Sammy Servil in the arena

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sammy, where's your father?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Quick, help him! That beast will kill him. He's too old to fight.

sections.title: Talking to General Khazard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: General Khazard?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: What do you want guard? I'm a busy man.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course sir.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: In the last two hundred years, I have survived all horrors imaginable. Now it is my turn to cover this land in darkness. One day you shall see, all will quake on hearing my name.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now leave me.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Who dares enter my home? You? A feeble traveller?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Feeble?!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Get out! Whoever let you in shall be severely punished for this.

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil sent me to rescue you and your son. Come on, we have to get out of here.

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: I'm too old to fight. I'm afraid you'll have to kill that ogre by yourself.

sections.title: Trying to exit the arena through the door

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Please don't go, you must help us. We'll never survive in here alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's your father Sammy?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Quick, help him! That beast will kill him. He's too old to fight.

sections.title: Attacking General Khazard
Talking to Lady Servil after freeing Sammy from the jail

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil. I freed your son, however he has returned to the arena to help your husband.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Oh no, they won't stand a chance. Please go back and help.

sections.title: Upon killing the Khazard Ogre

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: You saved my life and my son's, I am eternally in your debt brave traveller.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Haha, well done, well done that was rather entertaining. I am the great General Khazard, and the two men you just 'saved' are my property.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They belong to nobody.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Well, I suppose we could find some arrangement for their freedom... hmmm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: I'll let them go, but you must stay and fight for me. You'll make me double the gold if you manage to last a few fights.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Guards! Take [him/her] to the cells.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: The General seems to have taken a liking to you. He'd normally kill imposters like you without a second thought.

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil after defeating the ogre

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: You saved my life and my son's. I am eternally in your debt brave traveller.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil after defeating the ogre

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come on Sammy, we have to get out of here.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Thank you for saving my father.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Haha, well done, well done that was rather entertaining. I am the great General Khazard, and the two men you just 'saved' are my property.

sections.title: Exiting the arena after defeating the ogre

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Haha, well done, well done that was rather entertaining. I am the great General Khazard, and the two men you just 'saved' are my property.

sections.title: Talking to General Khazard after defeating the ogre

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have come to demand the release of Sir Servil and his son.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Why would I give them up, those two men are my property now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They belong to nobody.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy in the jail cell
Talking to Fightslave after killing the ogre

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: Please leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: Why am I here?

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: What did I do to deserve this?

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: Please help me.

lines.speaker: Fightslave
lines.text: You're not safe here, leave while you can.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard Guard inside the building after killing the ogre with Khazard armour equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: I hope you're keeping busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: General Khazard doesn't tolerate the lazy. If you're not keeping busy I'll practice my combat skills on your hide.

sections.title: Talking to Joe after killing the ogre

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Get away, get away. One day I'll have my revenge, and I'll have all your heads.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Spare me your fake pity. I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: You're not safe here traveller. Leave while you still can

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: You're a brave person. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.

sections.title: Talking to Kelvin after killing the ogre

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: Get away, get away. One day I'll have my revenge, and I'll have all your heads.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: Spare me your fake pity. I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: You're not safe here traveller. Leave while you still can

lines.speaker: Kelvin
lines.text: You're a brave person. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad in the jail cell

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you ok stranger?

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I'm fine thanks.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: So Khazard got his hands on you too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid so.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: If you're lucky you may last as long as me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you been here?

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I've been in Khazard's prisons ever since I can remember. I was a child when his men kidnapped me. My whole life has been spent killing and fighting, all in the hope that one day I might escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't give up.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Thanks friend.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: Wait.. sshh, the guard is coming. Looks like you'll be going into the arena. Good luck friend.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Right you, move it.

sections.title: Entering the building after starting the scorpion fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This door appears to be locked.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: So you're back for more are you? General Khazard will be pleased.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil in the arena during the scorpion fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll get us out of here.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: Thanks traveller. I'm sorry that you too are now a subject of this arena.

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil in the arena during the scorpion fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll get us out of here.

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: You've incurred the anger of Khazard yourself now. He won't let any of us go easily.

sections.title: Talking to General Khazard during the scorpion fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: How dare you speak to me, you are a slave of this arena now.

sections.title: Trying to exit the arena during the scorpion fight

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: It would be impolite to leave now. The General insists you stay a little longer.

sections.title: Upon killing the scorpion

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Not bad, not bad at all. I think you need a tougher challenge. Time for my puppy. Guards! Guards! Bring on Bouncer!

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil during the Bouncer fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come on, we only have to fight a creature called bouncer now.

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: You may laugh, but the name of the General's 'pet' is feared by many in this land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll get us out of here.

sections.title: Talking to the Local during the Bouncer fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: Hey you're the guy from the arena! How'd you get out!

sections.title: Talking to Hengrad during the Bouncer fight

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Hengrad
lines.text: I don't know how you managed to escape the arena, but you may not be as lucky next time. Get out of here while you can.

sections.title: Upon killing Bouncer

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Nooooo! Bouncer! How dare you? You've taken the life of my only friend. Now you'll suffer traveller, prepare to meet your maker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You agreed to let the Servils go if I stayed to fight.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Indeed. I obviously underestimated you, although you still pale in comparison to the might of General Khazard.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You shall see that I am not cowardly enough to make false promises. They may go.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You however have caused me much trouble today. You must remain here so that I may at least have the pleasure of killing you myself.

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil after killing Bouncer

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does Khazard want with us now?

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: I don't know, but I can't imagine he'll be happy with you now.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: The agreement was that the Servils may leave if you won a few fights, and indeed they are now free to do so.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil after killing Bouncer

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does Khazard want with us now?

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: I don't know, but he won't be happy that you've killed his so called pet.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: The agreement was that the Servils may leave if you won a few fights, and indeed they are now free to do so.

sections.title: Talking to Justin Servil after General Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can run, Khazard's interest is in me now.

lines.speaker: Justin Servil
lines.text: My thanks, we'll be ok now. I suggest you run too, General Khazard is mighty and his anger fearsome.

sections.title: Talking to Sammy Servil after General Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You and your father should run, Khazard's interest is in me now.

lines.speaker: Sammy Servil
lines.text: I'm sorry to have gotten you into so much trouble. You should run as well, Khazard is too dangerous.

sections.title: Talking to General Khazard after he attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You killed my pet, and yet still you dare to speak to me?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You shall die for your insolence.

sections.title: Entering the door to the building after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This door appears to be locked.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: You're [him/her]. The one who murdered the General's pet.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: You'll pay for that mistake!

sections.title: Opening the door to the arena after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: You're the one who killed Bouncer.

lines.speaker: Khazard Guard
lines.text: Die traitor!

sections.title: Talking to Sammy in the cell after Khazard attacks
Talking to the Local after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: You're the guy who beat Bouncer, amazing!

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: That makes you a champion to many, but you'd better get out of here while you still can. General Khazard liked that brute.

sections.title: Talking to Lady Servil after Khazard attacks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You're alive, I thought Khazard's men had taken you.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: My son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. I am truly grateful for your service.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: All I can offer in return is material wealth. Please take these coins as a sign of my gratitude.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: You're alive, I thought Khazard's men had taken you.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: My son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. I am truly grateful for your service.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: All I can offer in return is material wealth. Please take these coins as a sign of my gratitude.

sections.title: Post quest
Talking to Lady Servil after the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Lady Servil.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Oh hello my dear. My husband and son are resting while I wait for the cart fixer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope he's not too long.

lines.speaker: Lady Servil
lines.text: Thanks again for everything.
